narrative:
Lawrence Township has 4,028 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
